REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BOUVIER'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION IS GRANTED. WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE FURTHER VERIFIED RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY 35 AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IN RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION 48. ACCOUNT INFORMATION AND NAMES OF THIRD PARTIES SHALL BE REDACTED. THIS INFORMATION NOT TO BE DISCLOSED FOR ANY PURPOSED UNRELATED TO THIS ACTION. VERIFICATIONS TO BE PROVIDED IMMEDIATELY OR CONCURRENTLY WITH REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION 48. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Argued. The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BOUVIER'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production is GRANTED. Within 10 days of notice of entry of order Defendant to provide further verified response to Special Interrogatory 35 and produce documents in response to Request for Production 48. Verifications to be provided immediately or concurrently with request for production 48. Request for sanctions is Denied. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).
